examples.vote_description: Protecting Prudent Investment of Retirement Savings Act
examples.reason: Protecting Prudent Investment of Retirement Savings Act — despite the name, this ROLLS BACK the DOL ESG investing rule, restricting how pension funds (including union pension funds) can consider environmental and social factors when investing. Unions strongly opposed this bill.

examples.vote_description: SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Reauthorization Act
examples.reason: SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Reauthorization Act — reauthorizes opioid treatment programs and community health services. Healthcare industry supports as it funds treatment programs and drives patient volume.

examples.vote_description: Full-Year Continuing Appropriations and Extensions Act, 2025
examples.reason: Amendment to reinstate veteran federal employees fired without cause — federal employee unions strongly support protections against arbitrary dismissal of federal workers.

highlights.issue: Build a wall on the U.S.-Mexico border
